title: sanwichstats
description: Craft consumables that allow you to change your stats & gain interesting abilities (for a price).
body:
# **sanwichstats**

Craft wacky foods & drinks that, when eaten, permanently increase attributes in exchange for decreasing others (for example, gaining +2 health at the cost of -0.5 melee damage). Some foods have a separate upside, such as neat powerful abilities (levitation, teleportation) at a steep cost! All of the recipes in this datapack involve expensive later-game ingredients (e.g. echo shards, bottles o' enchanting). All expensive ingredients (besides the nether star) get their own recipe in this datapack. Use the advancements tab as a visual guide to all possible items and their effects.

## **Installation**

Put the zip file into both your resource pack folder _and_ your world's datapack folder.

## **Video Overview**
